CustomField.description: True when the CEQ NEPA Phase 2 Final Rule (May 1 2024, 89 FR 35442) applies to this process — i.e., NOI or CE determination issued on or after May 1 2024. Drives Climate_Assessment_Required__c and EJ_Analysis_Required__c. Citation: 40 CFR 1501.3 applicability; 40 CFR 1502.17 (climate); 40 CFR 1508.1(m) (EJ).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CEQ NEPA Phase 2 rule (May 2024) applies to this process. Triggers climate and EJ analysis requirements.
CustomField.label: NEPA Phase 2 Applicable
